title: rockia sandwicensis
intro: Rockia sandwicensis, commonly known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties and is known to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The therapeutic actions of Ma'o hau hele include its ability to calm the mind and body, making it useful for stress relief and promoting relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Rockia sandwicensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
